title: Roll of the Dice
description: Mod for 1.12.2 that adds dice and other chance-based features.
body:
A mod for Minecraft Forge 1.12.2 which adds dice and chance related features.

Current features:
* Wooden Die Block
  * The top number is randomized when the block is placed.
  * When right-clicked, the block will begin rolling.
  * When right-clicked while rolling, the block will stop rolling and display a random top number.

![Screenshot of the Wooden Die Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c733ab2836905e16e53965c8a687a405431742d.png)

* Iron Die Block
  * Unlike the Wooden Die Block, this block requires a redstone signal to roll.
  * It also emits a Redstone Comparator output signal depending on the number. (1-6)
  * All sides of the Iron Die Block display the "top" number.
  * While redstone signal is active, the block will roll.
  * When redstone signal is cut, the block will finish rolling and display a random number.

![Screenshot of Iron Die Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7da55e7f83d25e39fe1b8c43d45b9c9715f1d2c9.png)
